name: Cocoa Crunch Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the margarine.
2. Stir in the sugar and cocoa powder.
3. Add the pretzels, wheat squares, shredded wheat, oat cereal, and peanuts to the pan.
4. Cook, stirring frequently, for 2-3 minutes until the mixture is well combined.
5. Stir in the raisins and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until the mixture is dry.
6. Allow the mixture to cool completely before storing it in an airtight container.
